Description: Append an operation mask from a block tool arg with configurable filter type and optional additional blocks.
Title: Append Mask From Tool Arg

Options.Description: The block tool arg name from the brush item
Options.Label: Arg Name

Options.Description: The mask filter type to use with the block tool arg
Options.Label: Filter Type

Options.Description:
Inverts the selected mask filter type.

 Example: To set the mask to not use blocks in the block tool arg, have:

Filter Type = TargetBlock
Invert = Checked
Options.Label: Invert

Options.Description:
Additional blocks to apply the filter type to for the mask

 Example: To filter out Rock_Basalt blocks in addition to my block tool arg, do:

Rock_Basalt
Options.Label: Additional Blocks
